items.name_cn:
🌟Mini Size《White with Black》OHANEL🚩🚩🚩Kangpeng Basket Bag
Shining on the fashion stage, the Kangpeng Mimi basket bag is a stunning sight, attracting everyone's attention. Various classic colorways are timeless legends in the fashion world. Their collision on this handbag shows a simple yet powerful beauty. Kangpeng series' unique material gives the bag a soft touch and tough quality. Exquisite, cute, and practical. It can easily hold your phone, wallet, lipstick, and other small items while staying stylish. The handbag design makes you carry it with elegance and composure. Whether paired with casual jeans or a glamorous evening gown, it blends perfectly and adds to your overall look. Choosing the black and white Kangpeng mini basket bag means choosing a unique fashion attitude that makes you stand out.
Size: 20x16x7cm

items.name_cn:
🌟Moon Full Sheepskin Handbag
This Moon bag is designed with imported lambskin, and the lining is also fully sheepskin.
Comes with a 100cm detachable and adjustable leather long strap, can be carried by hand or on the shoulder, and a detachable leather key fob. Front triangular logo magnetic snap/button closure. Lightweight and practical!
Size: 22.5x16x7.5cm
Model: 1BA381 Sheepskin

items.name_en: 🌟New Arrival 🆕 Large Glossy Calfskin Panta Puzzle Handbag. The Puzzle bag features a distinctive rectangular silhouette defined by geometric lines. This large version is crafted from glossy calfskin, detailed with denim-style details. Can be worn over the shoulder, crossbody, or carried by hand*Detachable and adjustable shoulder strap*Zipper closure, leather zipper pull*One external zip pocket, one internal slip pocket*Herringbone cotton canvas lining*Anagram embossing

🌟New Cleo Crossbody Bag
This new vintage-style crossbody bag is made with imported water-wave calf leather and lined with imported sheepskin. Features an adjustable shoulder strap for a single shoulder carry. The look is stunning! Large capacity and highly practical, soft touch, and full of a premium feel.
Dimensions: 27x20x7cm
Model: 1BC179

items.name_cn:
🌟New Small Backpack
This nylon backpack is part of Prada's classic design, embodying the brand's key traits: innovative materials, luxurious practicality, and a reinterpretation of classics. Crafted from Re-Nylon regenerated nylon derived from purified ocean plastic, it balances a modern look with a minimalist design, showcasing a stylish and elegant charm while remaining lightweight and practical.
Size: 23.5x28x12cm
Style: 1BZ677 Silver Buckle

items.name_cn:
🌟Parachute Nylon Backpack
P's most classic, bestselling, and versatile backpack. Lightweight, rain-resistant, and with moderate capacity, it offers effortless styling for travel. Imported parachute fabric - waterproof and sun-proof. Front enamel logo with cross-grain calfskin trim. Drawstring inner pocket + two front zipper pockets. Meets the needs for refined storage.
Size: 28×23.5×12cm
Style: 1BZ677

I L❤️oewe you
Crazy about the mini puzzle
A beautiful color that captivates countless goddesses

items.name_en: 🌷 Style No. 735145. The new GG brand collections continue the design philosophy that items should not only be trendy for one season but remain timeless as time passes. The classic interlaced letter element derived from the initials of Guccio Gucci continues to infuse the brand's iconic charm into new designs. This Ophidia small handbag features historic GG Supreme canvas material and is equipped with double G accessories.
